scripts.view:influxdb: docker compose up -d --wait influxdb && echo 'InfluxDB UI -> http://localhost:8086 (user flowops / pass flowops123)' && xdg-open http://localhost:8086
scripts.view:mongodb: docker compose --profile tools up -d --wait mongodb mongo-express && echo 'Mongo Express -> http://localhost:8081' && xdg-open http://localhost:8081
scripts.view:redis: docker compose --profile tools up -d --wait redis redis-commander && echo 'Redis Commander -> http://localhost:8082' && xdg-open http://localhost:8082
scripts.view:cassandra: docker compose up -d --wait cassandra && docker exec -it flowops-cassandra cqlsh
